experience.title: Senior Educational Program Manager
responsibilities: Led the design and implementation of curriculum for K-12 educational programs, enhancing student engagement and performance.
Developed and executed program evaluations using assessment methodologies to measure educational impact.
Utilized data analysis tools such as Excel and Tableau to generate reports on program effectiveness and stakeholder engagement.
Managed accreditation processes ensuring compliance with national education standards.
Oversaw project management tasks using Asana, coordinating cross-departmental teams to achieve program goals.
Managed budgets for educational initiatives, including forecasting and reallocating funds as necessary.
achievements: Increased program enrollment by 30% over two years through strategic marketing and curriculum enhancements.
Received the 'Innovative Leadership Award' for outstanding contributions to educational program development.

experience.title: Educational Program Coordinator
responsibilities: Collaborated with faculty to develop curriculum that aligned with educational standards and student needs.
Conducted program assessments and provided actionable feedback for continuous improvement.
Led training sessions for educators on best practices in instructional design and program evaluation.
Participated in grant writing efforts to secure funding for innovative educational projects.
achievements: Successfully applied for and received a $100,000 grant for a new literacy program, contributing to 15% improvement in student reading scores.

skills.name: Data analysis and reporting using Excel
Data analysis and reporting using Tableau

response.summary: Dynamic and results-oriented Senior Educational Program Manager with over 7 years of experience in curriculum development, program evaluation, and educational leadership. Proven track record of enhancing educational offerings and driving student success through strategic planning and cross-departmental collaboration.
